eXist Javadocs

Packages
org.dbxml.core  
org.dbxml.core.data Defines and Implements several basic data types and container interfaces, including Key, Value, DocumentSet and NodeSet.
org.dbxml.core.filer Defines the dbXML Filer interface and implements several Filers, including BTreeFiler and HashFiler.
org.dbxml.core.indexer Defines the dbXML Indexer interface and implements the IndexManager, and NodeIndexer classes.
org.dbxml.xml  
org.exist  
org.exist.ant Implements a set of Ant tasks for storing documents into the database, removing/querying documents, backup/restore...
org.exist.backup Backup/Restore functions.
org.exist.client  
org.exist.cocoon Classes for integration with Cocoon.
org.exist.collections  
org.exist.collections.triggers  
org.exist.dom Classes that implement eXist's persistent DOM.
org.exist.http  
org.exist.http.realm  
org.exist.http.servlets  
org.exist.http.test  
org.exist.http.webdav  
org.exist.http.webdav.methods  
org.exist.jsp  
org.exist.memtree Package memtree implements a fast, in-memory DOM tree, which is used by eXist for the nodes created inside an XQuery expression.
org.exist.memtree.test  
org.exist.schema  
org.exist.schema.internalaccess  
org.exist.schema.test  
org.exist.security Security related classes.
org.exist.soap  
org.exist.source  
org.exist.start Bootstrap loader to start/stop the database and utility programs like the Java admin client.
org.exist.storage The main classes for eXist's XML storage backend.
org.exist.storage.analysis  
org.exist.storage.cache Contains different cache implementations used for buffering btree and data pages.
org.exist.storage.io  
org.exist.storage.io.test  
org.exist.storage.report  
org.exist.storage.serializers Classes to serialize stored documents back into raw XML.
org.exist.storage.store Contains the actual storage classes for the native XML storage backend.
org.exist.storage.sync  
org.exist.util  
org.exist.util.hashtable Optimized hashtable implementations for native Java types.
org.exist.util.hashtable.test  
org.exist.util.serializer Serializer package to write a DOM tree or SAX stream to a writer.
org.exist.util.serializer.encodings  
org.exist.util.test  
org.exist.xmldb eXist's implementation of the XML:DB API.
org.exist.xmldb.test  
org.exist.xmldb.test.concurrent  
org.exist.xmlrpc  
org.exist.xmlrpc.test  
org.exist.xquery Classes that implement the XQuery/XPath execution model.
org.exist.xquery.functions  
org.exist.xquery.functions.request  
org.exist.xquery.functions.text  
org.exist.xquery.functions.transform  
org.exist.xquery.functions.util  
org.exist.xquery.functions.xmldb  
org.exist.xquery.parser The XQuery/XPath language parser.
org.exist.xquery.test  
org.exist.xquery.value  
org.exist.xupdate  
org.exist.xupdate.test  
org.xmldb.api  
org.xmldb.api.base  
org.xmldb.api.modules  
org.xmldb.api.reference  
org.xmldb.api.reference.modules  
org.xmldb.api.sdk  
org.xmldb.api.sdk.modules  
org.xmldb.api.tests
